description: Prepare the dive logbook for an annual safety review submission to the diving operations safety board. Tag every dive with a maximum depth greater than 18 meters as 'deep'. For the December 2010 Hoodsport trip (Dives #2 through #5), ensure a buddy name is recorded by assigning 'David Price' to any dive currently missing one. Set the display units to Imperial (feet, psi, Fahrenheit, lbs) as required by the US-based reviewing board. Save all changes and export the complete dive log as a CSV to /home/ga/Documents/safety_audit_export.csv.

subtasks.deep_tagging: Tag all dives deeper than 18m with 'deep'
subtasks.buddy_fill: Fill missing buddy fields in Dec 2010 trip with 'David Price'
